message:
test: add case-insensitive label merging tests for flow and health

Add two new unit tests to verify that label normalization works
correctly when labels differ only by case:

- cross_label_flow_merges_case_variants: confirms that "Backend",
  "FRONTEND", and "frontend" are merged into their lowercase
  canonical forms, producing a single dependency with correct counts.

- all_label_health_merges_case_variants: confirms that "Backend" and
  "backend" collapse into one label entry with aggregated issue count
  in the health report.

These tests cover the case-insensitive normalization introduced in
5c249dd and guard against future regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
